title: Ceramic Vanity Tray, White Bathroom Tray Organiser for Dresser, Decorative Trinket Dish, Rectangle Jewellery Plate for Perfume, Cosmetic, Soap Dispenser, Candle, Kitchen Sink
features: 🧴【High-Quality Ceramic】Our bathroom tray is crafted from premium ceramic with a smooth, glazed surface that is waterproof and easy to clean. Unlike traditional resin or silicone trays, it resists scratches, warping, aging, and oxidation.

🧴【Elegant Design】This ceramic vanity tray features a minimalist rectangular design in pure white, exuding simplicity and style. It comes in two sizes to fit various interior styles, adding a touch of refinement and luxury to any space.

🧴【Versatile Uses】This bathroom organiser tray is perfect for organizing a variety of bathroom accessories, kitchen accessories, or vanity table essentials. It can serve as a soap dispenser tray, soap tray, kitchen sink tray, toothbrush tray, aftershave tray, or even a candle tray or hallway key tray.

🧴【Aesthetic Ceramic Tray】This white tray is an artistic home decor piece, making it an excellent choice as a dressing table tray or jewellery tray dish. It’s ideal for holding small plants, aromatherapy items, cosmetics, watches, eyeglasses, rings, necklaces, bracelets, earrings, and more.

🧴【Ideal Gift】This bathroom vanity tray is a thoughtful and unique gift, perfect for friends, wives, girlfriends, mothers, daughters, brides, or other special women. Whether for Mother’s Day, Teacher’s Day, Valentine’s Day, Christmas, Thanksgiving, bridal showers, birthdays, or other occasions, this cosmetic tray makes a memorable and heartfelt gift.
